name: [smoke] TabGroup renders without crash
[smoke] Tabs.Root compound API renders without crash
[smoke] size="s" renders without crash
[smoke] size="l" renders without crash
[smoke] appearance="secondary" renders without crash

[fn] defaultValue makes the matching tab selected
[fn] defaultValue panel is visible on mount
[fn] pressing a tab calls onValueChange with its value
[fn] pressing a tab updates selected state
[fn] pressing a tab shows its panel and hides the previous
[fn] pressing a disabled tab does not call onValueChange
[fn] pressing a disabled tab does not change the active panel
[fn] controlled value prop selects the specified tab
[fn] testID reaches the tab item Pressable
[fn] aria-label on TabItem overrides the children label
[fn] Tabs.Root compound API: pressing a tab switches the active panel
[a11y] tab item has accessibilityRole="tab"
[a11y] active tab has accessibilityState.selected=true
[a11y] inactive tabs have accessibilityState.selected=false
[a11y] disabled tab has accessibilityState.disabled=true
[a11y] enabled tab has accessibilityState.disabled=false
[a11y] string-children tab is accessible to screen readers (accessible=true)
[a11y] tab with aria-label is accessible regardless of children type
[a11y] TabList with aria-label has accessibilityRole="tablist" and accessible=true
[a11y] TabList without aria-label has accessible=false (tablist hidden from a11y tree)
[scroll] returns false before layout (both sizes are 0)
[scroll] returns false when viewportSize is 0 (layout not yet measured)
[scroll] returns false when content fits exactly in viewport
[scroll] returns false when content is smaller than viewport
[scroll] returns true when content overflows viewport by 1px
[scroll] returns true when 8 tabs overflow a typical phone width
[scroll] returns null when tab is fully visible (no scroll needed)
[scroll] returns offset when tab is fully off-screen to the right
[scroll] returns offset when tab is partially hidden to the right
[scroll] returns offset when tab is off-screen to the left (already scrolled past)
[scroll] returned offset brings tab into view with edge inset
[scroll] returns null when tab is fully visible vertically
[scroll] returns offset when tab is below the vertical viewport
[scroll] scrollEnabled is false before layout events (viewportSize=0)
[scroll] scrollEnabled becomes true when content overflows viewport
[scroll] scrollEnabled stays false when all tabs fit in the viewport
[scroll] scrollEnabled resets to false if tabs are removed and content no longer overflows
[scroll] horizontal TabGroup scrolls horizontally (horizontal=true on ScrollView)
[scroll] vertical TabGroup scrolls vertically (horizontal=false on ScrollView)
[bug] BUG-TABS-1: TabItem with ReactNode children and no aria-label is not accessible to screen readers
[bug] BUG-TABS-2: inactive TabPanel is unmounted from the tree instead of hidden
[a11y] resolves 'auto' with no parent to 'primary'
[a11y] resolves 'auto' with parentAppearance='secondary' to 'secondary'
[a11y] explicit 'sparkle' ignores parent appearance
[a11y] explicit 'positive' ignores parent
[a11y] undefined with no parent resolves to 'primary'
[a11y] item size 's' overrides ctx size 'l'
[a11y] orientation defaults to 'horizontal' when both item and ctx are undefined
[a11y] isSelected is false when selectedValue does not match tabValue
[a11y] isSelected is false when selectedValue is null
[a11y] isDisabled is true when disabled=true
[a11y] isDisabled is false when disabled is false
[a11y] isDisabled is false when disabled is undefined
[a11y] returns aria-label when both aria-label and children string are set
[a11y] returns string representation when children is a number
[a11y] returns undefined when children is a ReactNode (not string/number)
[a11y] returns undefined when no props are passed
